name: Frail older adult urolithin A trial is complete but has no posted results
summary: NCT06556706 remains the key frailty-specific urolithin A result-watch item for mitophagy and metabolite-restoration coverage.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT06556706 as completed with 26 frail older adults, randomized quadruple-masked urolithin A versus placebo design, actual completion on 2025-04-25, and no posted results in the API view checked on 2026-06-10.
population_or_model: Frail older adults aged 65 to 85 years
quantitative_note: Actual enrollment is 26, with mitochondrial area and cristae density as primary endpoints.
caveats: No-results registry status is not evidence of efficacy or failure.
The trial's primary endpoints are mitochondrial structure measures rather than hard clinical outcomes.
Because the population is frail older adults, posted results could materially affect confidence and safety framing.
